headline: Is American International Group (AIG) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether American International Group at around US$75.42 is offering fair value or a potential bargain, this breakdown will help you compare the current share price with what the underlying business may be worth. The stock has returned 3.4% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day and year to date returns show declines of 4.2% and 10.5% respectively. This sits alongside a 1 year return of a 2.3% decline and multi year returns of 57.7% over 3 years and 81.3% over 5...
